description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in semi-formal urban attire, featuring a fitted long-sleeve shirt, a necktie, and tailored trousers. He wears a flat cap on his head, and his footwear consists of sturdy lace-up boots suitable for city walking. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. The face is partially obscured by the cap, but the overall build is average and proportionate. The clothing is well-fitted, and the ensemble suggests a blend of business-casual and classic street style.
description: An adult male in semi-formal attire with a flat cap, long-sleeve shirt, tie, tailored trousers, and lace-up boots, arms extended horizontally.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat cap, shirt with tie, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the cap, facial features, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cap, shirt, trousers, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cap's profile, ear, and the straight alignment of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve dress shirt, necktie, tailored trousers, flat cap, lace-up boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
